member.name: T:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent
member.summary:
User's primary AI agent. Uses a three-phase FSM driven by threshold tables: - BaseBuilding: economy first — find mine, build base + barracks, train pawns - ArmyBuilding: train warriors and archers (alternating), build second barracks - Attacking: coordinated assault — warriors charge, archers range-fire
Phase transitions are evaluated each tick via : if all unit counts exceed the phase's max thresholds → progress; if any count drops below its min threshold → regress.
Defense is active in all phases: idle troops attack enemies within 10 cells of friendly buildings or pawns. During Attacking phase, uses for role-based targeting.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.EvaluateState(PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.GameState)
member.summary: Evaluate whether the agent should regress (-1), stay (0), or progress (1) based on the min/max thresholds defined in stateThresholds for the given state. Returns -1 if any actual count is below its min. Returns 1 if all actual counts are at or above their max. Returns 0 otherwise.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.RallyIdleTroops(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Move idle troops that are near a barracks to a nearby build position so they don't block spawns.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.DefendBase(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Defend: only attack enemies that are within a radius of our buildings or pawns. Each idle troop attacks the closest threatening enemy.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.FindClosestThreat(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},AgentSDK.Position,System.Single,AgentSDK.IGameState,System.Single@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Find the closest enemy (to the troop) that is within radius of any of our buildings or pawns.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.IsNearOurUnits(AgentSDK.Position,System.Single,AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Returns true if the enemy position is within radius of any friendly building or pawn.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.CoordinatedAttack(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Split targeting by unit type: warriors charge closest enemy (melee), archers prefer closest enemy within their attack range to avoid competing for the same cells as warriors.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.FindClosestTo(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Find the closest enemy to a given position.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.FindClosestWithinRange(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},AgentSDK.Position,System.Single,AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Find the closest enemy within a maximum range of a given position. Returns -1 if no enemy is within range.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.FindClosestToBase(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Find the enemy closest to our main base (for defensive prioritization).

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.InitializeMatch
member.summary: Called before each match between two agents. Matches have multiple rounds.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.InitializeRound(AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Called at the beginning of each round in a match.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.Update(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Update the GameManager - called once per frame

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.UpdateBaseBuilding(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: BaseBuilding phase: find a mine, build a base near it, train pawns, then build a barracks. Progresses to ArmyBuilding once thresholds are met.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.UpdateArmyBuilding(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: ArmyBuilding phase: train warriors and archers (alternating by count), build a second barracks, rally idle troops. Regresses to BaseBuilding if economy collapses; progresses to Attacking once army thresholds are met.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.UpdateAttacking(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Attacking phase: continue mining and training, launch coordinated attacks. Regresses to ArmyBuilding if army drops below attacking min thresholds.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.Mine(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Send all idle pawns to gather from the closest mine, delivering to the closest base. Each pawn independently selects its nearest mine and base by path length.
